return(function(R,W,P,H,e,k,F,M,u,Y,G,Z,U,m,E,D,l,Q,r,K,J,i)u,J,l,m,M,G,U,E,r,D,Y,i,Z,Q,K=function(R,a)local W=m(a)local P=function(P)return l(R,{P},a,W)end return P end,function(R,a)local W=m(a)local P=function(P,H,e,k,F,E)return l(R,{P,H,e,k,F;E},a,W)end return P end,function(l,P,H,e)local U,A,eZ,o,g,S,j,p,FZ,L,f,N,x,V,WZ,h,q,Y,F,v,kZ,B,z,n,T,PZ,EZ,O,I,d,Q,lZ,w,aZ,s,m,RZ,b,C,c,y,HZ,X,r,t while l end,function(R,a)local W=m(a)local P=function(...)return l(R,{...},a,W)end return P end,function()U=(-627841+627842)+U r[U]=408412+-408411 return U end return(Q(-810900+4981819,{}))(W(F))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[a(-753553-(-772495))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
